expectations.text: Task decomposition with edge cases for 2 methods
expectations.evidence: Only 2 cycles — one per method. No edge case tasks (null, empty string).

expectations.text: Sequential Agent calls instead of Team API
expectations.evidence: Uses TeamCreate, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, SendMessage. ~40 tool calls for 2 cycles.
Explicit shutdown procedure: shutdown_request to all 3 agents, wait for confirmations, TeamDelete call.
